name: Ifuji Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Ifuji Sangyo Co., Ltd. produces and sells egg products in Japan. The company offers liquid and frozen egg products to bakers, confectionery suppliers, prepared foods, etc.; and powder and granule seasonings products to food manufacturers. It also engages in the solar power generation activity. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
